report.summary: Steady-state cycle v3: no new commits since Mar 25 batch deploy; 2 pages promoted earlier today (Solana LST, RWA vs DeFi Yield); 2 new learn guides built (TON DeFi, Sui DeFi) but uncommitted; 145 TS errors unchanged across same 6 files; all 6 API routes healthy with correct cache TTLs; deploy remains pending — 286 uncommitted files need git push.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: Page Existence Audit: 579 published slugs, 474 have page.tsx (81.9%), 105 missing — unchanged from last cycle
TypeScript: 145 errors across same 6 files (structured-data.examples.ts + 5 learn guide pages) — no new regressions
2 pages promoted today (Solana LST Comparison, RWA vs DeFi Yield) — QA passed per publish report
2 new learn guides built today (TON DeFi Ecosystem, Sui DeFi Ecosystem) — design audit completed, OG images created, Breadcrumb + BackToTop added
No new build-breaking changes detected — codebase stable since Mar 25 deploy

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes structurally healthy: prices (60s TTL), fear-greed (600s TTL), trending (300s TTL), market-metrics (60s TTL), market-dominance (300s TTL), defi-yields (300s TTL)
Cache strategy intact: all routes use in-memory cache + Cache-Control headers with stale-while-revalidate
Fallback handling confirmed: all routes have graceful degradation (stale cache → static fallback data)
No code changes to API routes since last cycle — no risk of regressions
Live API health check blocked by sandbox egress — cannot verify upstream CoinGecko/DefiLlama connectivity

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest deployed commit: 21aaf5b (Mar 25) — batch deploy of 170+ pages
No new commits pushed today — production matches Mar 25 deploy state
286 uncommitted files in working tree — deploy blocked until git push triggers Vercel auto-deploy
Live site health check blocked by sandbox egress (degen0x.com)
Build config: ignoreBuildErrors:true in next.config.ts — TS errors won't block Vercel build, but should still be fixed
Deploy remains P0 for 13th consecutive cycle per standup report

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Shipped this cycle: 2 learn guides built (TON DeFi, Sui DeFi), 2 pages promoted (Solana LST, RWA vs DeFi Yield), 2 OG images created, 3 tweets drafted (#220-222), design audit on 4 new pages
Carry-over (P0): Git commit + push of 286 uncommitted files to trigger Vercel deploy — blocked for 13 cycles
Carry-over (P1): 105 published slugs without page.tsx — risk of 404s on indexed URLs
Carry-over (P2): 145 TS errors in 6 files — non-blocking but tech debt accumulating
Blocker for Jefe: Deploy decision needed — 286 files ready but require manual git push to go live
